creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
Update www/py-feedgenerator to 1.6, which is required to update Pelican. While we're here, do some fancy tricks as well:

 - Generate pkg-plist using easy_install so we don't have to make one
 - Convert to STAGE support
 - Remove stale patch

Fix: Apply the attached patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
